summary: Backend-only testing for VocalBiometric Studio. 18/18 pytest tests passed on first run covering all endpoints in scope: health, prompts, sessions CRUD, takes upload/list/patch/delete with synthetic WAV, audio stream, cleaner endpoints (correctly return 503 because FAL_KEY is empty), biometrics (empty + populated), package ZIP export, trained-model upload, api-keys CRUD, and public /api/v1 endpoints with X-API-Key auth (401 without, 412 without model, 200 with model). FAL_KEY is intentionally empty per problem statement.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py streams all uploaded takes as media_type='audio/webm' in /api/audio/{session_id}/{filename} regardless of the real extension (wav/mp3/etc). Browsers/mobile clients may fail to play non-webm files. Suggest mapping by file extension (mimetypes.guess_type) before returning FileResponse.

API keys are stored and returned in plaintext via list endpoint. For a public-facing API integration layer, consider returning the secret only once at creation time and storing only a hash/prefix afterwards.
upload_take writes .webm as default extension when filename has no suffix; this silently masks client bugs. Consider validating allowed audio MIME types and rejecting unknown types with 415.

Clean endpoints correctly return 503 when FAL_KEY empty. However, the cleaner writes the uploaded file to disk before raising 503 in POST /api/cleaner/clean — resulting in orphan temp files. Suggest early-fail if FAL_KEY missing.

/api/v1/infer returns a stub response ('Inference runner local pendiente de conexión') — documented as intended since the product is local-only RVC/So-VITS; just be sure the frontend/clients surface this correctly to avoid user confusion.
test_credentials: N/A — app has no auth (intentional). API key auth for /api/v1/* is tested dynamically per-test.
seed_data_creation: No seed data. All test data is prefixed TEST_ and cleaned up in fixtures/finally blocks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints listed in the review request are passing. Test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is idempotent and self-cleaning (uses TEST_ prefixed sessions and deletes them). When FAL_KEY is later configured, the two 503 assertions in TestCleaner must be relaxed or replaced with real fal.ai fixture mocking. Frontend was not tested per request.
